# CWE-140 positive: delimiter injection in CSV export
lang: go
file: CWE-140-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-140 Improper Neutralization of Delimiters
// Vulnerable line: comma-separated row built by naive concatenation.
func ExportRows(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.Query("name")
	role := c.Query("role")
	line := strings.Join([]string{name, role, "active"}, ",")
	csv := fmt.Sprintf("name,role,status\n%s", line)
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "text/csv", []byte(csv))
}
